Messages.Body: {"Type":"Notification","MessageId":"sns-message-alarm-1","TopicArn":"arn:aws:sns:sa-east-1:123456789012:ticketdovale-prod-alerts","Subject":"ALARM: payment-processor-prod-lambda-errors-alarm","Message":"{\"AlarmName\":\"payment-processor-prod-lambda-errors-alarm\",\"AlarmDescription\":\"Errors detected for payment processor lambda\",\"AWSAccountId\":\"123456789012\",\"NewStateValue\":\"ALARM\",\"NewStateReason\":\"Threshold Crossed: 1 datapoint was greater than or equal to the threshold.\",\"StateChangeTime\":\"2026-06-16T12:34:56Z\",\"Region\":\"South America (Sao Paulo)\",\"AlarmArn\":\"arn:aws:cloudwatch:sa-east-1:123456789012:alarm:payment-processor-prod-lambda-errors-alarm\",\"OldStateValue\":\"OK\",\"Trigger\":{\"MetricName\":\"Errors\",\"Namespace\":\"AWS/Lambda\",\"StatisticType\":\"Statistic\",\"Statistic\":\"SUM\",\"Unit\":null,\"Dimensions\":[{\"name\":\"FunctionName\",\"value\":\"payment-processor-prod-lambda\"}],\"Period\":60,\"EvaluationPeriods\":1,\"ComparisonOperator\":\"GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold\",\"Threshold\":1.0},\"NewStateReasonData\":\"{\\\"version\\\":\\\"1.0\\\",\\\"queryDate\\\":\\\"2026-06-16T12:34:56.000+0000\\\",\\\"startDate\\\":\\\"2026-06-16T12:29:00.000+0000\\\",\\\"statistic\\\":\\\"Sum\\\",\\\"period\\\":60,\\\"recentDatapoints\\\":[2.0],\\\"threshold\\\":1.0}\"}","Timestamp":"2026-06-16T12:35:01.000Z","SignatureVersion":"1","Signature":"SANITIZED_SIGNATURE","SigningCertURL":"https://sns.sa-east-1.amazonaws.com/SimpleNotificationService-sanitized.pem","UnsubscribeURL":"https://sns.sa-east-1.amazonaws.com/?Action=Unsubscribe&SubscriptionArn=sanitized"}
